# PerformancePattern

> Detected performance pattern from CPU/heap profiling

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| patternType | hot_function \| memory_leak \| slow_io \| cpu_spike \| gc_pressure | yes | - | Type of performance pattern |
| functionName | string | yes | - | Function or module name |
| filePath | string | yes | - | Source file path |
| lineNumber | integer | yes | - | Line number |
| selfTime | float | yes | - | Self time in milliseconds |
| totalTime | float | yes | - | Total time including children |
| callCount | integer | yes | - | Number of invocations |
| heapDelta | integer | yes | - | Heap size change in bytes |
| severity | critical \| warning \| info | yes | - | Severity level |
| profileSessionId | string | yes | - | Associated profile session |
| recommendation | string | yes | - | Suggested fix |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |
